description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly black and yellow color scheme accented by metallic elements. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with visible ribbing and metallic bands, suggesting reinforced construction. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped, with yellow striping for visual contrast and grip enhancement. The receiver area is blocky and metallic, with a visible trigger guard and a prominent pump mechanism beneath the barrel. The overall build appears heavy-duty, suitable for urban tactical scenarios, and the materials suggest a combination of metal and polymer. The shotgun's details, such as the ribbed barrel and reinforced stock, indicate a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A heavy-duty, black and yellow shotgun with a ribbed barrel, full stock, and visible pump mechanism, designed for urban tactical use. The metallic and polymer construction emphasizes durability and functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, ribbed barrel, and symmetrical alignment of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the pump mechanism, and the ergonomic full stock with yellow striping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the barrel and receiver aligned.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and pump mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and metallic bands
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
